message:
test(daemon): add 23 unit tests for coverage audit (bd-ak47)

protocol.rs: 10 new tests - internal_error, rerank/shutdown/status/health
request roundtrips, scores response roundtrip, envelope constructor,
embed request with no dims.

client.rs: 10 new tests - with_config, with_socket_path, daemon_pid
(no file, temp file, invalid content), InferenceMode constructors
(new, daemon_only, default), client Default impl, without_auto_spawn.

core.rs: 6 new tests - with_paths, with_resources (with and without
socket override), uptime_secs, requests_served init, model_daemon_new,
handle_rerank_none_model.

Daemon unit test count: 35 → 58 (66% increase).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
